steps.formalization:
PREDICATES:
rough(x) ::: x is rough
needs_bear(x) ::: x needs the bear
blue(x) ::: x is blue
nice(x) ::: x is nice
eats_eagle(x) ::: x eats the bald eagle
eats_bear(x) ::: x eats the bear
chase_eagle(x) ::: x chases the bald eagle
chase_bear(x) ::: x chases the bear
cold(x) ::: x is cold

PREMISES:
not rough(bald_eagle)
not needs_bear(bear)
needs_bear(dog)
forall x (rough(x) -> chase_eagle(x))
forall x (needs_bear(x) -> not blue(x))
forall x (nice(x) -> chase_eagle(x))
forall x (eats_eagle(x) -> rough(x))
forall x (cold(x) and chase_bear(x) -> rough(bear))
forall x (eats_bear(x) and needs_bear(x) -> not eats_eagle(bear))
forall x (cold(x) and nice(x) -> eats_eagle(dog))
forall x (needs_bear(x) -> eats_eagle(x))

CONCLUSION:
needs_bear(dog)

PREDICATES:
rough(x) ::: x is rough
needs(x,y) ::: x needs y
blue(x) ::: x is blue
nice(x) ::: x is nice
eats(x,y) ::: x eats y
chase(x,y) ::: x chases y

PREMISES:
~rough(bald_eagle)
~needs(bear,bald_eagle)
needs(dog,bear)
forall x (rough(x) -> chase(x,bald_eagle))
forall x (needs(x,bear) -> ~blue(x))
forall x (nice(bear) -> chase(bear,bald_eagle))
forall x (eats(x,bald_eagle) -> rough(x))
forall x (cold(x) and chase(x,bear) -> rough(bear))
forall x (eats(x,bear) and needs(x,bear) -> ~eats(bear,bald_eagle))
(cold(dog) and nice(dog)) -> eats(dog,bald_eagle)
forall x (needs(x,bear) -> eats(x,bald_eagle))

CONCLUSION:
needs(bear,bald_eagle)

lion(lion)

forall x (nice(x) and red(x) -> green(x))
forall x (round(x) -> visits(x,lion))

not(round(lion))

CONCLUSION:
